title: coffea sessiliflora subsp. mwasumbii
intro: Coffea sessiliflora subsp. mwasumbii, a lesser-known species, is a subspecies of coffee plant native to the tropical regions of East Africa. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, derived from its leaves and seeds. The health benefits of Coffea sessiliflora subsp. mwasumbii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
